TPGS Storage Conditions for 01/31/2026


Notice Text:

The following restrictions will be in place on the Tres Palacios Gas Storage, LLC (TPGS) system for Gas Day January 31, 2026:

Tres Palacios has scheduled and sealed withdrawal nominations. No increases to authorized withdrawal overrun nominations will be allowed except to comply with NAESB bump guidelines.

Tres Palacios has restricted a portion of authorized withdrawal overrun nominations and IWS activity at meter 45301 - TEXAS EASTERN (TPGS1120B). No increases in withdrawals or IWS activity will be accepted to meter 45301 - TEXAS EASTERN (TPGS1120B) except to comply with NAESB bump guidelines.

Tres Palacios has restricted a portion of authorized withdrawal overrun nominations and IWS activity at meter 45307 - FLORIDA GAS TRANSMISSION (TPGS1080B). No increases in withdrawals or IWS activity will be accepted to meter 45307 - FLORIDA GAS TRANSMISSION (TPGS1080B) except to comply with NAESB bump guidelines.

Customers are advised that capacity may become available as the nomination and confirmation process continues throughout the day.

Please contact your Operations Account Representative if you have any questions.
